# nerdctl_image_load (Action)

Loads images from a tar archive with `nerdctl load`. The archive is read from the target host, not the machine running Terraform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "nerdctl_image_load" "preload" {
  config {
    input = "/srv/images/app.tar" # read from the target host
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `input` (String) Path on the target host of the tar archive to load.
